name: Kodi4Seniors
description: Tooling configuration for the Kodi4Seniors repository

scripts.lint:xml: xmllint --noout skin.kodi4seniors/addon.xml skin.kodi4seniors/1080i/Font.xml skin.kodi4seniors/1080i/Includes.xml skin.kodi4seniors/1080i/Home.xml skin.kodi4seniors/1080i/Settings.xml skin.kodi4seniors/1080i/MyPVRChannels.xml skin.kodi4seniors/1080i/MyPVRGuide.xml skin.kodi4seniors/1080i/DialogButtonMenu.xml
scripts.validate: npm run lint:python && npm run lint:xml && npm run build
